users.bio: Selling dorm essentials before summer move-out.
Grad student clearing out the apartment.

listings.title: Mini Fridge — Like New
listings.description: Danby 1.7 cu ft compact fridge. Barely used, no dents, works perfectly. Great for a first-year dorm. Runs quietly. Selling because I'm moving off-campus.

listings.title: Keurig K-Mini Coffee Maker
listings.description: Works great. Comes with 12 assorted K-Cups to get you started. Used for one semester. Clean, no mineral buildup. Perfect for early morning 9ams.

listings.title: Box Fan (Lasko 20")
listings.description: Essential for Cambridge summers. Two-speed setting, runs quietly on low. Slight scuff on the back panel but works 100%. Pickup near Allston.

listings.title: Rice Cooker + Steamer (Zojirushi)
listings.description: 3-cup Zojirushi. One of the best dorm appliances you can have. Makes perfect rice every time. Comes with measuring cup and paddle. Used 2 years.

listings.title: IKEA MICKE Desk + Hutch
listings.description: White, 28" wide. Fits comfortably in any dorm room. Hutch has shelves for books and a cable cutout. Some scuffs on the bottom edges. Must pick up.

listings.title: Adjustable Floor Lamp
listings.description: Tall LED arc lamp with dimmer switch. Three color temperatures (warm, neutral, cool). Great for studying. Bulb included. Works perfectly.

listings.title: IKEA KALLAX Shelf (4-cube)
listings.description: White, 2x2 cube organizer. Great for books, bins, or a record collection. A few small chips on the top edge. Easy to disassemble for transport.

listings.title: Ergonomic Office Chair
listings.description: Mesh back, adjustable height and armrests. Good lumbar support — helped a lot during finals. Slight wear on the seat pad but structurally solid.

listings.title: 24" 1080p Monitor (Acer)
listings.description: 60Hz, IPS panel. HDMI + VGA input. Very clean display, no dead pixels. Great for dual-monitor setups or just upgrading your dorm workstation. Stand included.

listings.title: Mechanical Keyboard (TKL, Cherry MX Brown)
listings.description: Tenkeyless layout, white backlight. Perfect for coding and typing. Tactile switches, not clicky — dorm-friendly. Comes with USB-C cable.

listings.title: CS50 + Python Crash Course (bundle)
listings.description: David Malan's CS50 companion book + Python Crash Course 3rd ed. Both lightly annotated (pencil only). Ideal if you're taking intro CS this fall.

listings.title: Principles of Economics (Mankiw, 9th ed.)
listings.description: Standard Ec10 text. Highlighted in yellow only. All pages intact. Retails for $280 new — this'll save you a lot. Pickup anywhere in the Yard.

listings.title: Organic Chemistry (Clayden, 2nd ed.)
listings.description: Used for LS1b. Heavy annotations in the first half, clean in the second. This book is a brick — worth every penny of the $20 over renting.

listings.title: North Face Puffer Jacket — Men's M
listings.description: Dark navy, 550-fill. Worn two winters. No tears, zipper works perfectly. Slightly faded near the cuffs. Great for Boston winters — you'll need it.

listings.title: Loft Bed Frame (Twin XL)
listings.description: Metal loft frame, adjustable height up to 60". Creates tons of under-bed storage. Sturdy — held up 3 years. Hardware included. Needs 2 people to carry.

listings.title: Twin XL Bedding Set (sheets + duvet)
listings.description: Light grey. 100% cotton sheets + white duvet insert + cover. Washed and clean. Everything you need for a dorm bed. Don't overpay at Target.

listings.title: Shower Caddy + Toiletry Organizers
listings.description: Rustproof metal caddy with 3 shelves + a hanging organizer for the back of your door. Used one year, very clean. Everything a freshman needs for shared bathrooms.

listings.title: Trek FX2 Hybrid Bike + U-Lock
listings.description: 52cm frame, 21-speed. Replaced brake pads last fall. Some scratches on the frame, mechanically solid. U-lock + cable lock included. Great for commuting to class.

listings.title: Instant Pot Duo 3-Quart
listings.description: 7-in-1 multi-cooker. Perfect size for a dorm or studio. Used about 30 times. All accessories included (trivet, sealing ring, manual). Clean and working perfectly.

listings.title: 5-Piece Non-Stick Cookware Set
listings.description: 8" and 10" skillets, 2qt saucepan, 3qt saucepan, 5qt stockpot. All non-stick coating in good shape — no peeling. Moving into a place with cookware included.

listings.title: Compact Microwave (700W)
listings.description: 0.7 cu ft, works well, clean inside. Easy to pick up near campus. Selling because I'm cooking more off-campus next year.
